entries.title: Acid Blood
entries.description: Your blood is caustic. Creatures that attack you in melee suffer d4 acid damage when they damage you.

entries.title: Adhesive Touch
entries.description: Your hands and feet are like those of a gecko. You can climb any surface and crawl across ceilings.

entries.title: Albino
entries.description: Your body has no pigmentation. You must carry a sunshade (1 slot) or suffer DIS on all Saves during daylight hours.

entries.title: Antlers
entries.description: You have antlers like an elk or moose. Make an extra +d6 melee attack when you charge.

entries.title: Analgesia
entries.description: You are unable to feel pain. You do not know your maximum or current HP; the Referee tracks both.

entries.title: Armoured Skin
entries.description: Your body is protected by natural armour. Add +2 to your base AV.

entries.title: Backwards Head
entries.description: Your head can swivel backwards like an owl's. You cannot be ambushed.

entries.title: Backwards Legs
entries.description: Your legs are backwards. DIS when fleeing and sneaking.

entries.title: Beak
entries.description: Make an extra d6 melee attack. ADV on reaction rolls when encountering bird-like creatures.

entries.title: Bioelectricity
entries.description: Your unarmed melee attack causes +d6 electrical damage.

entries.title: Bioluminescence
entries.description: Your flesh produces a faint glow. You always have a light source. DIS to hide at night.

entries.title: Blind
entries.description: You cannot see and must navigate by sound and scent. DIS on ranged attacks, ADV when fighting in the dark. Cancels effects of other visual mutations.

entries.title: Body Barbs
entries.description: Your flesh is studded with sharp barbs. Opponents who miss melee attacks against you suffer damage equal to your Level.

entries.title: Bulbous Eyes
entries.description: Your eyes are enormous. DIS on Saves to avoid blindness.

entries.title: Centaur
entries.description: You have the lower body and legs of a horse. +2 CON, +4 max items slots (24 total).

entries.title: Chameleon Skin
entries.description: Your skin always matches its surroundings. ADV to conceal yourself.

entries.title: Claws, Crab
entries.description: One hand is a huge crab-like claw. Your unarmed attack deals d8 damage. You cannot use two-handed weapons.

entries.title: Claws, Retractable
entries.description: You have retractable feline claws. Your unarmed attack deals d6 damage.

entries.title: Clubfoot
entries.description: One foot is larger and heavier than the other. DIS when fleeing and sneaking.

entries.title: Compound Eyes
entries.description: Your eyes are like those of a fly. +1 DEX.

entries.title: Crest, Bone
entries.description: You have a large bony crest on your head. +1 AV. Cannot wear helmets.

entries.title: Crest, Feathers
entries.description: You have a crest of feathers on your head. +1 EGO. Cannot wear helmets.

entries.title: Crown, Horns
entries.description: You have a crown of horns on your head. +1 AV. Cannot wear helmets.

entries.title: Crown, Coral
entries.description: You have a coral-like crown on your head. +1 AV. Cannot wear helmets.

entries.title: Crown, Eyestalks
entries.description: You have a crown of eyestalks on your head. +1 PSY. Cannot wear helmets.

entries.title: Cyclops Eye
entries.description: You have a single huge eye. You have poor depth perception. DIS on Saves vs blindness.

entries.title: Detachable Head
entries.description: Your head can detach from your body and move of its own accord for as long as you can hold your breath.

entries.title: Detachable Limb
entries.description: A single limb can detach from your body and move of its own accord. If separated from your body it cannot 'see' and must proceed by touch alone.

entries.title: Double Muscled
entries.description: Your limbs have an extra pair of muscles. +2 STR, ADV when fleeing or pursuing.

entries.title: Echolocation
entries.description: You can 'see' in pitch darkness using echoes. You cannot be blinded and have ADV when fighting in the dark.

entries.title: Exposed Organs
entries.description: You suffer double damage from slashing or piercing attacks.

entries.title: Extra Arms
entries.description: You have an extra pair of arms. You can make an extra melee or ranged attack each turn, if equipped with a second weapon.

entries.title: Extra Eyes
entries.description: You have d3 extra eyes on your forehead. +1 PSY for each.

entries.title: Extra Head
entries.description: You have an extra head. ADV on INT, PSY and EGO Saves. You can survive one decapitation.

entries.title: Extra Heart
entries.description: +2 CON, +5 max HP.

entries.title: Extra Legs
entries.description: You have a pair of extra legs. +2 CON, ADV on Saves relating to pursuits.

entries.title: Extra Liver
entries.description: ADV on Saves vs poisons and TOX attacks.

entries.title: Eyestalks
entries.description: Your eyes extend out of their sockets on stalks.

entries.title: Fangs, Venomous
entries.description: You have a poisonous bite (d6 TOX).

entries.title: Feathers
entries.description: You have feathers instead of hair. ADV to reaction roll when encountering feathered creatures.

entries.title: Frog Tongue
entries.description: Your tongue is extremely long and sticky. DEX save to snatch weapons from foe's hands.

entries.title: Fur
entries.description: You are covered in fur. ADV to reaction roll when encountering furry creatures.

entries.title: Gills
entries.description: You have gills and can breathe underwater. You must drink double rations of water each day or become Deprived.

entries.title: Gliding Membranes
entries.description: You have membranes between your arms and torso and can glide for short distances.

entries.title: Goat Legs
entries.description: You have the legs and hooves of a goat. You can walk up sheer surfaces.

entries.title: Headless
entries.description: You have no head; your face is on your torso. You cannot wear helmets or hats.

entries.title: Heightened Hearing
entries.description: You have extremely sharp hearing. You suffer no ill-effects from blindness or darkness and cannot be ambushed.

entries.title: Heightened Immune System
entries.description: Your immune system is the envy of all. ADV on Saves vs diseases and poisons.

entries.title: Hook, Climbing
entries.description: You have hook-like protrusions on your limbs. ADV to climbing and acrobatics.

entries.title: Hopper
entries.description: You have a single, powerful leg. You can leap huge distances.

entries.title: Horns, Ram
entries.description: You have ram-like horns. You can make an extra d6 melee attack. ADV on reaction rolls when encountering other horned creatures.

entries.title: Horns, Rhino
entries.description: You have a single rhino-like horn. When you charge into melee range, add +d10 to your damage roll.

entries.title: Huge Beard
entries.description: You have a gigantic, fast-growing beard that resists all attempts to tame it.

entries.title: Huge Brain
entries.description: Your head is enormous. +2 to INT. Cannot wear helmets or hats.

entries.title: Humpback
entries.description: You have a hump like that of a camel, which stores water. You can go seven days without drinking water.

entries.title: Infravision
entries.description: You can detect heat signatures and can see warm-blooded creatures in total darkness.

entries.title: Ink Ducts
entries.description: You can spray out ink like a squid, causing an opponent to DEX save vs blindness. You can do this a number of times per day equal to your Level.

entries.title: Insulated Skin
entries.description: Your skin is resistant to heat and cold. Take half damage from extreme temperatures.

entries.title: Kangaroo Pouch
entries.description: You have a torso-pouch like a kangaroo's. +2 max item slots (22 max).

entries.title: Larynx Darts
entries.description: You can cough bony barbs from a discreet orifice in your neck. Treat as a concealed d4 ranged weapon that cannot run out of ammunition.

entries.title: Leaves
entries.description: You have leaves instead of hair. Regain d4 HP per hour when resting in sunlight.

entries.title: Malleable Body
entries.description: Your body is rubbery and malleable; you can fit into tight gaps. Take half damage from bludgeoning attacks.

entries.title: Malleable Face
entries.description: Your face is malleable; you can imitate the faces of others given time.

entries.title: Mane, Hair
entries.description: You have a lion-like mane of hair around your neck. +1 EGO.

entries.title: No Ears
entries.description: You have no external ears; just holes.

entries.title: Obligate Carnivore
entries.description: You must eat raw meat each day or become Deprived.

entries.title: Patterned Skin
entries.description: Your skin is striped or spotted. +1 EGO.

entries.title: Pleasant Fragrance
entries.description: Your scent is pleasing to all. +1 EGO.

entries.title: Poison Spur
entries.description: You have a poison spur on your wrist. Your unarmed attack deals d6 TOX damage.

entries.title: Powerful Jaws
entries.description: You can bite through metal. Add +d6 to melee attack damage.

entries.title: Prehensile Feet
entries.description: Your feet can grip objects like hands. +1 DEX.

entries.title: Prehensile Hair
entries.description: Your hair can grip objects like a hand. +1 DEX.

entries.title: Quills
entries.description: You have quills coating your body. Add +2 to your AV. Opponents who miss melee attacks against you suffer damage equal to your Level. You cannot wear other armour.

entries.title: Scaly Skin
entries.description: Your skin is thick and scaly. Add +1 to your AV.

entries.title: Silk Production
entries.description: You can produce strands of sticky web. Make an opposed DEX save to wrap an enemy in web, paralysing them until they succeed at a DEX save.

entries.title: Skeletal Frame
entries.description: Your body is incredibly light. -2 STR and -2 CON. You take double damage from bludgeoning and crushing attacks.

entries.title: Slimy Skin
entries.description: You are coated in slime. ADV to escape grab attacks and enclosing traps.

entries.title: Slug Body
entries.description: You have a single slimy tail-foot and leave a trail of mucus. -2 DEX, can stick to sheer surfaces.

entries.title: Small Stature
entries.description: Your body is child-sized and will never grow larger. DIS on all STR saves.

entries.title: Snout
entries.description: You have a snout-like, animalistic face. ADV to reaction rolls with Newbeasts.

entries.title: Stilt Legs
entries.description: You have long stilt-like legs. ADV in chases and pursuits, can wade quickly through flooded areas. You are the default target for ranged attacks.

entries.title: Strange-Hued Eyes
entries.description: Your eyes are an unnatural colour.

entries.title: Strange-Hued Hair
entries.description: Your hair is an unnatural colour.

entries.title: Strange-Hued Skin
entries.description: Your skin is an unnatural colour.

entries.title: Tail, Club
entries.description: You have a club-like, heavy tail. Make an extra d8 crushing melee attack per round.

entries.title: Tail, Prehensile
entries.description: You have a long, thin tail that can grip objects. +2 DEX.

entries.title: Tail, Scorpion
entries.description: You have a segmented stinging tail like a scorpion's. Make one extra attack per round (d6 TOX).

entries.title: Tentacles, Arms
entries.description: You have tentacles instead of arms. -3 STR, +3 DEX.

entries.title: Tentacles, Hair
entries.description: You have stinging tentacles instead of hair. At melee range you can make a d6 TOX attack instead of your normal attack.

entries.title: Toxic Flesh
entries.description: Your flesh is toxic when eaten (d10 TOX).

entries.title: Transparent Skin
entries.description: Your skin is transparent and your muscles and veins can be seen. Take double damage from Beam attacks.

entries.title: Trunk
entries.description: You have an elephant-like trunk, which can hold and manipulate objects. +1 DEX.

entries.title: Tusks
entries.description: You have tusks like a boar. +D6 melee damage.

entries.title: Ultravision
entries.description: You have eyes that see beyond the normal spectrum of light. You can see otherwise invisible creatures and objects. You cannot be blinded.

entries.title: Vestigial Wings
entries.description: You have vestigial, unusable wings.

entries.title: Vocal Mimic
entries.description: You can perfectly mimic voices or sounds you have heard.

entries.title: Warty Skin
entries.description: Your skin is thick and warty. Add +1 to your AV.

entries.title: Webbed Digits
entries.description: Your hands and feet are webbed like a frog's.

entries.title: Whiskers
entries.description: You have sensitive whiskers like a cat. +1 PSY.

entries.title: Wings
entries.description: You have wings that allow you to fly freely. When airborne you are the default target for ranged attacks.
